title: ADP Agent Config
description: Configuration object consumed by the `adp-agent` library's AdpAgent class. Describes an agent's identity, decision classes, peers, plugins, and optional ACB / anchor settings. This schema is the source of truth for editor autocomplete and config validation.

agentId.description: DID of this agent (e.g. did:adp:test-runner-v2). Globally unique within a federation.

port.description: HTTP port the agent listens on.

domain.description: Canonical domain serving the agent's .well-known/adp-manifest.json. Used in manifest URLs and peer discovery.

decisionClasses.description: Decision classes the agent claims authority over (e.g. 'code.correctness', 'security.policy').

authorities.description: Map of decision class → declared authority in [0, 1]. Peers audit these against recomputed calibration over time.

stakeMagnitude.description: How much the agent has at stake in each deliberation. Affects weighting under ADP §4.

defaultVote.description: Fallback vote when the evaluator is absent or errors.

defaultConfidence.description: Fallback confidence in [0, 1] when the evaluator is absent or errors.

dissentConditions.description: Enumerable conditions under which the agent would vote differently. Must be falsifiable — the federation tests these in belief-update rounds.

falsificationResponses.description: Map of condition_id → response when another agent submits falsification evidence against that condition.

journalDir.description: Filesystem path where the journal stores deliberation records. For JsonlJournal, this is a directory of .jsonl files.

evaluator.description: Optional evaluator plugin config. If absent, the agent falls back to defaultVote/defaultConfidence.

command.description: Shell command to run. Exit 0 = approve, non-zero = reject. JSON stdout parses as EvaluationResult.

allowedCommands.description: Sandbox — if set, the command must start with one of these prefixes.

peers.description: Known peers for P2P deliberation. Empty for standalone agents; populated after joining a federation.

initiator.description: Whether this agent can initiate deliberations. Default false.

plugins.description: Optional plugin configs — extensible, format depends on the plugin.

auth.description: Authentication and Ed25519 signing config. Secrets should come from env vars, not the config file.

bearerToken.description: Token peers must send in Authorization: Bearer <token> on protected endpoints.

peerTokens.description: Map of peer agentId → bearer token to use when calling them.

privateKey.description: Ed25519 private key (hex) for signing proposals and calibration snapshots.

publicKey.description: Ed25519 public key (hex) published in manifest for verification.

allowUnsignedLocal.description: Allow unsigned proposals from localhost. Testing only.

allowedPeers.description: If set, only these peer agentIds are allowed to participate. Sybil resistance.

acbDefaults.description: ACB (cognitive budget) defaults applied when a deliberation is started with useDefaultBudget=true.

budgetAuthority.description: DID of the principal that authorizes budgets.

calibrationAnchor.description: Optional Neo3 blockchain anchor config. Requires the adp-agent-anchor package to be installed.

target.description: Which chain to anchor to. 'mock' is for tests only.

contractHash.description: Hex contract hash of the deployed CalibrationStore contract (with or without 0x prefix).

privateKey.description: Ed25519 private key (hex) for the anchor wallet. Prefer env var ADP_ANCHOR_PRIVATE_KEY.

publishIntervalSeconds.description: How often to publish the current calibration snapshot. Default 3600 (1 hour).
